name: Sakitama
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Sakitama" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Spirit monster from your hand. If this card is Tributed: Target 1 Spirit monster in your GY; add it to your hand.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Trigger, Condition, Ignition, Trigger
action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
